swe-architect-mcp.//description: Portable template for running SWE Architect MCP as a local stdio MCP server.
swe-architect-mcp.//command_note: Use the Python executable where this package is installed. Examples: 'python', 'python3', './.venv/bin/python', '/absolute/path/to/.venv/bin/python', or 'C:/path/to/.venv/Scripts/python.exe'.
swe-architect-mcp.//cwd_note: Set cwd to the project you want lifecycle artifacts created in. Use '.' for the current workspace, or an absolute project path.
swe-architect-mcp.//env_note: Set SE_MCP_API_KEY and SE_MCP_MODEL for the LLM provider you want. The provider is inferred from the model/key. Replace placeholders locally; do not commit real keys.
